pulse: The Healthcare sector trades at a median EV/EBITDA of 13.7x and a median P/E of 25.5x, above the S&P 500's forward P/E of 21.6x, reflecting its robust revenue growth of 9.1%. Notably, LLY stands out with an impressive trailing P/E of 45.9x and a revenue growth rate of 42.6%, while PFE trades at a much lower EV/EBITDA of 8.2x despite slightly positive profit margins, illustrating a pronounced valuation spread within the sector. Investors should consider the ongoing earnings growth trajectory against the macroeconomic backdrop, as continued rotation into cyclicals may pressure multiples in higher-valuation stocks while favoring more attractively priced names with stable growth such as HUM and CI.
